examples.title: Hello World Program
examples.description: A simple C++ program that prints 'Hello, World!' to the console.
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates the basic structure of a C++ program, including the `#include` directive, the `main` function, and the `std::cout` statement.

examples.title: C++ Compilation Process
examples.description: A C++ program that demonstrates the compilation process, including preprocessing, compilation, assembly, linking, and loading.
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates the C++ compilation process, including preprocessing, compilation, assembly, linking, and loading.

examples.title: C++ Compiler Flags
examples.description: A C++ program that demonstrates the usage of the `g++` command flags, including `-c`, `-g`, and `-o`.
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates the usage of the `g++` command flags, including `-c`, `-g`, and `-o`.
